item.title: Neale Daniher’s closest mates Bill Guest and Chris Fagan share agonising last conversations
item.description: The icon still had his humour but ‘I knew when we left we’d never see Neale again - it was very sad’.

item.title: Russia warns foreigners to evacuate Kyiv as it threatens onslaught on Ukraine’s capital
item.description: Moscow claims the strikes are in response to an attack on a student dorm in Russian-controlled Luhansk.

item.title: Donald Trump hinges Iran peace deal on Arab nations recognising Israel
item.description: The US president has warned of fresh attacks if current peace talks fail.

item.title: Dozens of drones plunge from the sky during Vivid Sydney light show
item.description: Multiple shows have been cancelled following the malfunction.

item.title: Rescuers race against time to reach seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
item.description: Seven people who ventured into a cave to look for gold have been trapped for a week after flash flooding blocked their exit.

item.title: US unleashes barrage of new ‘self-defence strikes’ on Iran during tense peace talks
item.description: Tensions are intensifying between the two countries as both sides contest details in proposed peace agreements.

item.title: Danish Royal Run: Queen Mary supported by her children for the annual event
item.description: The Australian-born royal announced her father’s sad passing in April.

item.title: Sam Armytage farewells her 100-year-old grandma Dorothy with emotional post
item.description: ‘She was 100 and pure magic.’

item.title: Millions of Australian households to save hundreds on power bills from July
item.description: Some households could save up to $229 a year.

item.title: Calls for early-onset bowel cancer to be considered ‘new disease’ as cases surge among young Aussies
item.description: Doctors are sounding the alarm as the disease is ‘driven by factors that we don’t yet understand.’

item.title: Alleged serial tip jar thief caught on CCTV targeting cafes and charity collections across southeast Queensland
item.description: ‘Five seconds and she’s gone.’

item.title: ‘Dangerous’ baby bottle self-feeding devices permanently banned in Australia
item.description: ‘We urge consumers to stop using these devices immediately.’

item.title: Brisbane City Council slugs drivers more than $45 million in parking fines in less than a year
item.description: The numbers reveal which parking offences are costing motorists the most.

item.title: Major change coming to JobSeeker after years of ‘inefficiencies’
item.description: The reforms mark the system’s first overhaul in three decades.

item.title: Anne Hathaway reveals secret health battle: 'Half blind'
item.description: ‘I didn’t realise how bad it had gotten.’

item.title: Humble farmer’s shocking response to winning $12 million lottery prize
item.description: ‘Now is not a good time.’

item.title: Renewed call for Indigenous Voice to Parliament during Reconciliation Week
item.description: One thing has become increasingly clear since the referendum in 2023, say Uluru Dialogue co-chairs.

item.title: Customers caught up in ticketing reshuffle as Come Alive! The Greatest Showman Circus Spectacular comes to Australia
item.description: Attendees claim seats to the popular live show were moved back and some families were separated across venues.

item.title: Heartwarming moment rescue team celebrates after survivors discovered in Laos cave
item.description: The five villagers were trapped in a flooded cave for eight days before a Thai rescue crew located them.

item.title: Pat Cummins and Travis Head miss out on IPL final after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powers Rajasthan Royals to victory
item.description: The freakish teenager has once again left the cricket world speechless.

item.title: Tax changes defended by Labor higher-ups despite criticism from state leaders
item.description: Two state premiers have now broken ranks and urged the government to change course.

item.title: Eleven feared dead in US chemical tank rupture as search moves from rescue to recovery
item.description: ‘We’re bracing ourselves for this being the deadliest industrial tragedy in modern Washington state history.’

item.title: Home and Away: Who will get shot?
item.description: Will one beloved Summer Bay resident take their last breath?

item.title: ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo spared from Eid sacrifice after going viral in Bangladesh
item.description: The albino buffalo’s flowing blond hair and fringe drew comparisons to the US president.

item.title: Woman fronts court after alleged tip jar and charity box theft spree in Queensland
item.description: ‘It’s just so many of them,’ a magistrate said while refusing the woman bail.

item.title: Supercars referee Craig Baird cops whack for publicly shaming ‘grub’ driver Ryan Wood
item.description: The respected official has been forced to issue a public statement after crossing a line.

item.title: Australian Josh Richards flying to Laos to rescue survivors trapped in flooded cave
item.description: The experienced diver concedes he is ‘scared’ as rescue teams battle dangerous conditions.

item.title: Australian ‘looksmaxxer’ influencer Androgenic removed from Jetstar flight after cosmetic surgery in Thailand
item.description: ‘You’re swelling right now, your eyes ... Your face is very ill.’

item.title: Iran and US trade new strikes as Trump dismisses pressure to end war
item.description: Both sides are accusing the other of violating their shaky ceasefire and further imperiling diplomatic efforts to end the war.

item.title: Middle East war: Peace deal between Iran and US hinges on Donald Trump’s signature
item.description: The cost of oil is predicted ‘come down very quickly’ once a deal is finalised.

item.title: John Farnham speaks about the future of his singing career: ‘Not possible’
item.description: The Australian music legend stepped back from the stage following his 2022 oral cancer diagnosis.

item.title: Singer Susan Boyle teases new single Just One and debuts bold new look
item.description: The Scottish musician rose to fame when her 2009 audition for Britain’s Got Talent went viral.

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes into massive fireball during latest engine test
item.description: The rocket was being prepared to launch satellites for Amazon’s internet network.

item.title: F1 obsessed scientists name ancient wasp species after Oscar Piastri
item.description: The biologists just couldn’t help themselves after they found the preserved, ancient species.

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu tasks Israeli army with taking 70 per cent of Gaza Strip
item.description: ‘Let’s start with that.’

item.title: Frustrated parents accuse Roblox of normalising gambling for young children
item.description: ‘I don’t think personally they should even be allowed to spend there. At their age they don’t know what is good or bad.’

item.title: US comedian Rosie O’Donnell details plastic surgery journey and confirms facelift
item.description: ‘There’s a point where acceptance starts to feel like lying.’

item.title: Prince Haakon of Norway shares update on his wife Princess Mett-Marit’s chronic lung condition
item.description: The princess confirmed she was diagnosed with the incurable disease in 2018.

item.title: Officeworks moves Australian jobs to India and Philippines as part of ‘significant’ transformation
item.description: The company claims the move will help keep prices low for customers.

item.title: EOFY NBN and internet plans you can’t afford to miss
item.description: EOFY deals on NBN are heating up with major providers offering big discounts.

item.title: X creator push exposes pay gap facing Australian creators and publishers
item.description: The new X Creator Connect raises questions about Australian creator income, TikTok monetisation and payments.

item.title: Former prime minister Tony Abbott named federal Liberal Party president
item.description: ‘I regard it as my duty to serve the party in this time of existential crisis.’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife 2026: Meet all the ladies competing for love
item.description: A brand-new crop of farmers are ready to follow their hearts with the show set to premiere on June 8.

item.title: Australian study challenges forgetfulness and mental fog known as ‘baby brain’ in mums and dads after childbirth
item.description: Researchers warn the powerful social narrative could become a self-fulfilling prophecy.

item.title: First survivor is safely out of flooded cave in Laos, rescue diver says
item.description: A multinational team is set to help the remaining villagers on Saturday after more than a week trapped.

item.title: MND cases rising in Australia as researchers hunt for breakthrough treatments
item.description: The death of AFL great Neale Daniher from motor neurone disease and NRL player Jai Arrow's diagnosis have thrust the cruel condition back into the spotlight.

item.title: Short-stay accommodation in Sydney City Council firing line as critics lay blame for rental shortage
item.description: ‘They’re a blight on our society and they’ve absolutely exacerbated the housing crisis.’

item.title: Helicopter pilot breaks long silence on F1 legend Michael Schumacher’s mountain rescue
item.description: ‘When the commander ordered us to remove our microphones ... I understood that it was true.’

item.title: Bus driver to face charges after deadly crash involving vehicles slowed for work zone on US highway
item.description: A car burst into flames and dozens of passengers were rushed to hospital after the bus slammed into vehicles slowing for roadworks.

item.title: Three climbers killed after fall near Denali Pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley
item.description: A fourth mountaineer was dramatically rescued by helicopter after the group plunged along one of the peak’s most dangerous routes.

item.title: Family of slain cops slam sale of Wieambilla ‘house of horrors’
item.description: Relatives say the sale ‘is an absolute insult to the memories’ of the two young constables and neighbour killed in the ambush a the remote property.

item.description: The insults are coming thick and fast but the player is passionately defending himself.

item.description: Regional servos are expected to receive extra fuel as authorities scramble to ease mounting pressure on supplies.

item.description: ‘This year has been quite interesting.’

item.description: The Canadian man is accused of sending at least 1200 packages to more than 40 countries including New Zealand.

item.description: ‘What’s really frustrating is that it was predictable.’

item.description: Video captured the emotional moment mud-soaked villagers emerged from the cave.

item.description: The skipper put his own celebrations on hold to check on the rival whose horror penalty ended the match.

item.description: The allrounder and Marnus Labuschagne were bamboozled by a teenage debutant and their struggles proved crucial to the result.

item.description: The 29-year-old still has a reason to smile despite being knocked out in Paris.

item.description: ‘World Cup tension’ was in the air after Mexico pounced with the referee’s back turned.

item.description: The government says a major change to the plans will simplify the fleet.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.
